header.title: Admin Dashboard
header.description: Centralized administration for managing documentation health, content tools, and system settings. Run health checks, validate data integrity, and maintain the documentation library at scale.

securityNotice.title: Authentication Required
securityNotice.description: In production, all admin features will require authentication. Role-based access control (RBAC) will restrict features based on user permissions. Currently in development mode for demonstration.

sections.title: Documentation System
sections.description: Health monitoring, gap analysis, quality assurance, and automated remediation tools.

tools.title: Health Overview
tools.description: System-wide health dashboard with real-time stats, coverage tracking, and changelog history.

tools.title: Gap Analysis
tools.description: Identify missing content areas, under-covered topics, and opportunities for new documentation.

tools.title: Doc QA Overview
tools.description: Automated documentation quality assurance hub with 5 validation tools and remediation workflow.

tools.title: Count Validation
tools.description: Validate that all overview pages, listing pages, and stat cards display accurate counts matching the data layer.

tools.title: Route Verification
tools.description: Verify every sidebar nav link, cross-reference href, and content slug resolves to an existing page.

tools.title: TOC Integrity
tools.description: Ensure table of contents links point to valid heading anchors within each documentation page.

tools.title: Auto Remediation
tools.description: One-click fixes for common issues: stale counts, missing anchors, broken cross-references.

sections.title: Content & Marketing Tools
sections.description: Digital marketing management, email preview, and content pipeline for scaling content production.

tools.title: Digital Marketing
tools.description: Platform marketing for Google, LinkedIn, Twitter/X, and Facebook. SEO, ads, content composers, and analytics.

tools.title: Email Preview
tools.description: Preview and test email templates before sending to customers and business notifications.

tools.title: Content Pipeline
tools.description: 10-pass gap analysis with review log scanning, audience coverage, and batch content pipeline.

upcomingFeatures.title: Upcoming Features
upcomingFeatures.description: Planned enhancements to the admin dashboard for future releases.

features.title: User Management
features.description: Manage user accounts, roles, and permissions for team members and administrators.

features.title: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Track form submissions, user engagement, and business metrics in real-time.

features.title: System Settings
features.description: Configure application settings, email providers, and integration options.

cta.title: Need Help?
cta.description: Visit the documentation section for guides on using admin tools, running health checks, and troubleshooting common issues.
